name: SaaS (SOC 2 Type II / ISO 27001)
description: Multi-framework report for SaaS providers: SOC 2 Type II + ISO 27001 + ISO 27017. Surfaces shared-responsibility boundaries and multi-tenancy isolation evidence.
narrative_persona: VP of Security preparing a SOC 2 Type II observation period
